## Meeting Purpose

[Handover and sync on Engine account, discussing current status, strategies, and next steps for content production and client management.](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Engine is a travel management platform focusing on blue-collar workers, particularly in construction](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Content strategy involves mix of net-new content (5) and article refreshes (5), with emphasis on bottom-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [James (CMO) prefers batch reviews and is detail-oriented about product representation](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Tone of voice needs adjustment in article refresher pipeline to match audience-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Topics

### Account Overview and Strategy

  - [8-week foundation plan in place, providing week-by-week strategy for onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [TopicOS includes topical clusters and personas, with focus on construction-related content](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Content batches preferred by James (CMO) for review, aiming for 20-30 topics at a time](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Competitors: TravelPerk, Navan, Etsy Light (not direct blue-collar competitors, but organic search competitors)](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### Content Production and Guidelines

  - [Mix of net-new content (5) and article refreshes (5) per batch](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Writing guidelines artifact working well, but tone of voice needs adjustment in article refresher pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Stock images preferred, no need for image generation pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Product tie-ins and internal linking appreciated by client](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

### Client Communication and Review Process

  - [Content delivery and review via Slack, not Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [James (CMO) is hands-off with Airtable, prefers Slack for comments and approval](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [GA4 and Google Search Console access available for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Looker dashboards being built by Dave for client use](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Client Specifics and Challenges

  - [Engine rebranded from Hotel Engine, avoid mentioning old brand](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Focus on blue-collar audience, particularly construction, oil & gas, manufacturing, sports teams](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Specific verticals and personas require tailored content approaches](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Client has extensive Gong call data but hesitant to share due to IP concerns](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)

### Visual Content

  - [Visuals generated using Claude AI, close to brand identity but can be improved](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Current visuals well-received by client, despite some brand inconsistencies](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

### Tone and Voice Considerations

  - [Current tone may be slightly too edgy; aim for 10% less while maintaining punchiness](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Balancing professional tone with relatability to blue-collar audience](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Darrell and Carrie to join upcoming calls with James to introduce themselves](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Adjust article refresher pipeline to incorporate appropriate tone of voice](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Explore possibilities for accessing client's Gong call data in a sanitized format](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Continue focus on bottom-funnel content tied directly to product solutions](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Monitor and report on direct signups from blog content](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Await Looker dashboard completion for enhanced performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xi_qs3yZsgzhNUJK_diEq3tUZhRfEFfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
